theory.canonical_statement: [ID 999] ROTATIONAL PHI CANCELLATION Canonical Statutory Formula: $\Phi_{\times} = \text{Interference}[\text{DualPhase}]$ Formal Technical Dissertation: Used to denote the destructive interference of dual-phase vortex field states, utilized for noise cancellation and stealth modes. Source: [15]
theory.technical_interpretation: ROTATIONAL PHI CANCELLATION Canonical Statutory Formula: Φ_× is an algebraic definition, written Φ_× = Interference[DualPhase]. It is an algebraic definition expressing the quantity directly in terms of the variables on its right-hand side. Within the Trawin Zero Point registry it serves as one element of the framework's mathematical narrative.
